zh.lifeSummary: 當Henricus Tibbetts於1596年7月4日出生在英國時，他的父親Nicholas Tibbets36歲，母親Mary Baker33歲。他於1631年之前與Elizabeth Austin在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1635年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼。他去世於1676年6月27日之前在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henricus Tibbetts于1596年7月4日出生在英国时，他的父亲Nicholas Tibbets36岁，母亲Mary Baker33岁。他于1631年之前与Elizabeth Austin在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1635年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼。他去世于1676年6月27日之前在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾。

nameMeanings.name: Tibbetts
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Staffordshire): variant of Tebbutt , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Tibbets
meanings: English (Warwickshire and Staffordshire): variant of   Tibbetts  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Tebbetts
meanings: English (Northamptonshire): variant of   Tibbetts  . This form of the surname is very rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Tebbutt
meanings: English: from the Middle English female personal name Tebot, a rhyming variant of Ebot, itself a variant of Ibot, a pet form of Isabel. See Isbell and Hibbitt , and compare Tibbett . In some instances it may alternatively be an altered form of the Middle English surname Tebald, Tebaut; see Theobald .

nameMeanings.name: Henricus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: Massachusetts Colony Gains Control of New Hampshire
historicEvents.description: In 1641, Massachusetts gained control of New Hampshire until 1679 when New Hampshire became a separate royal colony.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Henricus Tibbetts was born on 4 July 1596, in England, his father, Nicholas Tibbets, was 36 and his mother, Mary Baker, was 33. He married Elizabeth Austin before 1631, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He immigrated to Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1635. He died before 27 June 1676, in New Hampshire, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henricus Tibbetts est né le 4 juillet 1596, à Angleterre, son père, Nicholas Tibbets, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Mary Baker, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Austin avant 1631, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il a immigré au Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1635. Il est décédé avant 27 juin 1676, à New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henricus Tibbetts è nato il il 4 luglio 1596 nel England, il suo padre, Nicholas Tibbets, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Mary Baker, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Austin prima del 1631, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Immigrato nel Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America nel 1635. Morì prima del 27 giugno 1676, nel New Hampshire, British Colonial America.

ko.lifeSummary: Henricus Tibbetts(이)가 1596년 7월 4일 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas Tibbets(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Baker(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1631년 이전 영국에서 Elizabeth Austin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1635년에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이로 이민을 떠났다. 그는 1676년 6월 27일 이전 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henricus Tibbetts nasceu em 4 de julho de 1596, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Nicholas Tibbets, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Mary Baker, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Austin antes 1631, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele imigrou para o Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1635. Ele faleceu antes 27 de junho de 1676, em New Hampshire, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henricus Tibbetts родился 4 июля 1596 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Nicholas Tibbets было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Baker, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Austin перед 1631 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он иммигрировал в массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1635 году. Он умер перед 27 июнь 1676 г. в местности ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henricus Tibbetts nació el 4 de julio de 1596, en Inglaterra, su papá, Nicholas Tibbets, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Mary Baker, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Austin antes de 1631, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Inmigró a Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1635. Murió antes de 27 de junio de 1676, en New Hampshire, British Colonial America.
